texto: Life on earth survives thanks to diversity, says Sekunda, because changing circumstances means today's winners can suddenly become tomorrow's losers. When the meteor hits, when the Green Revolution fails, when the bees unexpectedly die, the kind of anomalous diversity found in the Galapagos Islands—or in the technology of Japan—is exactly what will save us from the most dangerous failure of all: global success.
explicacao: Citação de Momus sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Life on earth survives thanks to diversity, says Sekunda, because changing circumstances means to…” articula tempo, culture, diversity em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como diversity e evolution.
